ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Brand name of the diaper */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the specific product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range of the diapers */,
  "material" TEXT /* Primary materials used in the product */,
  "eco_friendly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is eco-friendly */,
  "wetness_indicator" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has a wetness indicator */,
  "hypoallergenic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is hypoallergenic */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the brands table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Safety, Comfort) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of what the feature entails */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "importance" INTEGER /* Numerical value indicating the importance of the feature (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linked product */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the linked feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value or description of the feature for the linked product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1 to 5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User's comment regarding the product */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchaser */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the user has */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the diaper brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for customer inquiries */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the brand */,
  "CEO" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comparison */,
  "product_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of products being compared */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comparison was created */,
  "comparison_type" TEXT /* Type of comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparisons_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference is being recorded */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the preference relates to */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value indicating the user's preference (e.g., 'high', 'medium', 'none') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image relates to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analytics record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., view, compare, review) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
